ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the size (e.g., 7–8, 9–10) */,
  "size_cm" TEXT /* Corresponding size in centimeters (e.g., 130, 140) */,
  "size_in_inches" TEXT /* Corresponding size in inches */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country-specific sizing standards (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement in centimeters (for bottoms) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, in) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clothing type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing type (e.g., casual, formal, sportswear) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing type the item belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the item belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the item belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement the item belongs to */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability status of the clothing item (true for in stock, false for out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication (e.g., English, Spanish) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the order */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "clothing_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item the inventory belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the clothing item in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the clothing item (when inventory falls below this level, a reorder is triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_clothing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("clothing_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer the measurement belongs to */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement in centimeters (for bottoms) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, in) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
